title: Oil falls as Vance comments raise hopes for a diplomatic resolution to Mideast conflict
summary: U.S. VP JD Vance indicated Tehran holds the next steps in Iran-U.S. peace efforts, boosting hopes for diplomatic resolution and causing oil prices to decline. This matters as Middle East tensions directly impact global energy markets and economic stability.
content: U.S. Vice President JD Vance said Monday that the next steps in U.S.-Iran peace efforts now depend on Tehran.

zh.title: 万斯言论提升中东和平希望，油价下跌
zh.summary: 美国副总统万斯表示伊朗掌握伊朗-美国和平努力的下一步，提升了外交解决的希望，导致油价下跌。这很重要，因为中东局势直接影响全球能源市场和经济稳定。

title: Novo Nordisk partners with OpenAI as AI drug discovery hopes mount
summary: Novo Nordisk partnered with OpenAI to leverage AI for analyzing complex datasets and identifying promising drug candidates. This collaboration reflects the growing role of artificial intelligence in pharmaceutical development and accelerating drug discovery timelines.
content: The partnership will enable Novo to better use AI to analyze complex datasets, and identify promising new drugs.

zh.title: 诺和诺德与OpenAI合作推进AI药物发现
zh.summary: 诺和诺德与OpenAI合作，利用人工智能分析复杂数据集并识别有前景的候选药物。这一合作反映了人工智能在制药开发中的作用不断增长，并加速了药物发现的时间表。

title: Streaming viewers are OK with double the commercials as ‘subscription fatigue’ sets in
summary: As streaming costs rise, consumer surveys show viewers are willing to accept increased advertising in exchange for lower subscription prices. This reflects growing demand for affordable streaming options amid rising subscription fatigue.
content: As streaming costs go up, viewers are looking for better deals — and many say they’d watch more ads for lower prices, a new survey shows.

zh.title: 随着"订阅疲劳"加剧，流媒体用户愿意接受更多广告
zh.summary: 随着流媒体成本上升，消费者调查显示用户愿意接受更多广告以换取较低的订阅价格。这反映了在日益增加的订阅疲劳中对廉价流媒体选项的需求增长。

title: European markets set to rise on hopes that Iran peace talks can resume
summary: European stock markets are expected to open higher Tuesday as investors anticipate renewed Middle East peace negotiations despite ongoing U.S. port blockade on Iran. Market optimism is driven by potential resolution of geopolitical tensions affecting global stability and energy prices.
content: European stocks are expected to open higher on Tuesday amid renewed hopes that Middle East peace talks could resume, despite a U.S. blockade on Iranian ports.

zh.title: 欧洲股市因伊朗和平谈判有望恢复而上涨
zh.summary: 欧洲股市周二预期开盘上涨，投资者期待尽管美国继续对伊朗港口实施封锁，中东和平谈判仍可能恢复。市场乐观情绪受到地缘政治紧张局势缓解的前景和全球稳定及能源价格改善的推动。

title: Founder of China's Evergrande pleads guilty to fraud
summary: Hui Ka Yan, founder of China's former real estate giant Evergrande (once valued at $50bn), pleaded guilty to fraud charges. This marks a significant development in China's real estate crisis and regulatory crackdown on corporate misconduct.
content: Evergrande was once China's biggest real estate firm, with a stock market valuation of more than $50bn.

zh.title: 中国恒大创始人认罪欺诈罪
zh.summary: 中国前房地产巨头恒大创始人许家印认罪欺诈罪。恒大曾估值500亿美元。这标志着中国房地产危机和监管部门打击企业不当行为的重大进展。

title: China exports growth in March misses estimates, imports surge most in over four years
summary: China's March export growth fell short of expectations as manufacturers faced rising energy costs exacerbated by Iran conflict disruptions, while imports surged at the fastest pace in over four years. The divergence signals strong domestic demand but fragile global supply chains.
content: China's export growth slowed in March as manufacturers grappled with surging energy costs, with the Iran war disrupting supplies, while imports jumped more than expected.

zh.title: 中国3月出口增长未达预期，进口创四年多来最大增幅
zh.summary: 中国3月出口增长未达预期，制造商面临伊朗冲突加剧导致的能源成本上升，而进口以四年多来最快的速度激增。这种差异表明国内需求强劲，但全球供应链脆弱。

title: Know when to walk away: The decision that shaped Aviva CEO Amanda Blanc
summary: Aviva Group CEO Amanda Blanc reflects on her bold decision to leave a senior executive role without a safety net and how it taught her to trust her instincts about organizational fit. Her experience illustrates the importance of recognizing when to exit situations despite career advancement.
content: At one of the highest points in her career, Amanda Blanc made a decision most executives would avoid — she walked away. In this episode of "Executive Decisions," the Aviva Group CEO reflects on leaving a senior role with no safety net, the judgment required to know when something isn’t right and how that instinct shaped the decisions she’s made since.

zh.title: 知道何时放手：塑造Aviva首席执行官阿曼达·布兰克的决定
zh.summary: Aviva集团首席执行官阿曼达·布兰克反思了她大胆的决定——在没有保障的情况下离开高管职位，以及这如何教会她相信自己的直觉和组织适应度的判断。她的经历强调了认识到何时离开岗位的重要性，即使这可能意味着放弃职业晋升。

title: Oil prices ease on hopes of new US-Iran peace talks
summary: Crude oil prices eased from above $100/barrel as new U.S.-Iran peace talks provide fresh diplomatic optimism following weekend negotiations failure. Oil market volatility demonstrates investor sensitivity to Middle East geopolitical developments.
content: Crude prices jumped above $100 on Monday after talks failed between the two sides at the weekend.

zh.title: 油价因美伊和平谈判新希望而回落
zh.summary: 由于美伊和平谈判新希望带来外交乐观情绪，原油价格从100美元/桶以上回落，这发生在周末谈判失败之后。油价波动表明投资者对中东地缘政治发展的敏感性。

title: Goldman Sachs has the top rank among the S&P 500 by this remarkable statistic
summary: Goldman Sachs consistently maintains the highest shareholder rewards among S&P 500 companies, demonstrating strong financial performance and capital allocation. This metric reflects the investment bank's sustained ability to generate shareholder value.
content: The investment bank has consistently rewarded its shareholders.

zh.title: 高盛在标普500公司中以这一卓越指标排名第一
zh.summary: 高盛在标普500公司中持续保持最高的股东回报，展现了强劲的财务表现和资本配置。这一指标反映了该投资银行持续创造股东价值的能力。

title: Man charged with attempted murder over attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
summary: A Texas man was charged with attempted murder in connection with an attack on OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home, with authorities discovering documents advocating violence against AI executives. The incident highlights escalating tensions and safety concerns surrounding AI leadership.
content: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.

zh.title: 男子因对OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼家的攻击被控谋杀未遂
zh.summary: 一名德州男子因对OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼家的攻击而被控谋杀未遂,当局发现了倡导对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。这一事件凸显了围绕人工智能领导层的紧张局势和安全问题的加剧。

title: Hollywood stars unite to oppose Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery merger
summary: Entertainment industry stars including Emma Thompson and Ben Stiller signed an open letter opposing the proposed Paramount-Warner Bros Discovery merger, despite company claims it would expand creator opportunities. The opposition reflects broader concerns about industry consolidation and creative independence.
content: Stars like Emma Thompson and Ben Stiller signed an open letter against the deal, which Paramount said will ensure creators "have more avenues for their work, not fewer".

zh.title: 好莱坞明星联合反对派拉蒙特和华纳兄弟发现公司合并
zh.summary: 包括艾玛·汤普森和本·斯蒂勒在内的娱乐业明星签署了一封公开信,反对提议的派拉蒙特-华纳兄弟发现公司合并,尽管公司声称这将扩大创作者的机会。这一反对反映了对行业整合和创意独立性的更广泛关切。

title: Asia markets open higher amid hopes of a U.S.-Iran deal; China trade data in focus
summary: Asia-Pacific markets open higher Tuesday as investors remain optimistic about potential U.S.-Iran negotiations and await China's economic data. The positive sentiment reflects cautious hope for diplomatic progress on a key geopolitical tension.
content: Asia-Pacific markets open higher Tuesday, amid positive investor sentiment that a deal between the U.S. and Iran is still possible

zh.title: 亚太市场随美伊协议希望升高；中国贸易数据成焦点
zh.summary: 亚太市场周二开盘走高，投资者对潜在美伊谈判保持乐观，等待中国经济数据。积极情绪反映了人们对这一关键地缘政治紧张局势外交进展的谨慎希望。

title: WNBA No. 1 draft pick Azzi Fudd will make $500,000 as a rookie — more than a 500% raise over last year’s pick
summary: WNBA's No. 1 draft pick Azzi Fudd will earn $500,000 in her rookie season, over 500% more than last year's top pick. The significant raise reflects the league's new labor agreement, which has created the wealthiest rookie class in WNBA history.
content: The WNBA’s latest labor agreement paved the way for the league’s wealthiest rookie class ever

zh.title: WNBA状元秀Azzi Fudd新秀赛季年薪50万美元——比去年状元高薪超500%
zh.summary: WNBA状元秀Azzi Fudd将在新秀赛季赚取50万美元，比去年状元高出500%以上。这一重大加薪反映了联盟新劳动协议，该协议创造了WNBA历史上最富有的新秀班级。
